steps.title: Compare the slopes
steps.content: The equations $y=x+20$ and $y=8x$ represent lines. Their slopes are $1$ and $8$, which are different.

steps.title: Use the line intersection fact
steps.content: Two nonparallel lines in the $xy$-plane intersect at exactly one point.

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content: Graph the two equations and count the intersection points. The answer is B.
